collection: CUL & Bodl., L-G ; CUL & Bodl., L-G
description: Legal document in which Ḥusn bt. Yaḥyā ibn al-Zūrīqā, wife of Abū Naṣr Shelomo b. Saʿadya b. Hallun declares that she has received a full twelve months’ worth of food, clothing, water, oil and rent that is due to her and her children from Shelomo. Ḥusn's daughter Jalīla bt. Shelomo is also mentioned. Dated: 1358 Seleucid = 1046/47 CE. (Information from CUDL.) Related to T-S NS 324.10 (PGPID 25622) but not a join.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בCUL & Bodl..
